name: [YAOC2 Sandbox] OpenCTI Sync

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation StixBundleImport($content: String!) { stixBundleImport(content: $content) { id } }', variables: { content: JSON.stringify($json.stix_bundle) } }) }}
